rw [Set.infinite_coe_iff]
  refine Set.infinite_of_injective_forall_mem (f := fun n : ℕ => 
    ((n + 2 : ℚ) / (n + 1), -(1 : ℚ) / (n + 2), -(n + 1 : ℚ))) ?_ ?_
  · intro m n hmn
    simp only at hmn
    have h1 : (m + 2 : ℚ) / (m + 1) = (n + 2 : ℚ) / (n + 1) := by
      have := congrArg Prod.fst hmn
      simp at this
      exact this
    have hm1 : (m + 1 : ℚ) ≠ 0 := by positivity
    have hn1 : (n + 1 : ℚ) ≠ 0 := by positivity
    field_simp at h1
    linarith
  · intro n
    simp only [Set.mem_setOf_eq]
    use (n + 2 : ℚ) / (n + 1), -(1 : ℚ) / (n + 2), -(n + 1 : ℚ)
    have hn1 : (n + 1 : ℚ) ≠ 0 := by positivity
    have hn2 : (n + 2 : ℚ) ≠ 0 := by positivity
    refine ⟨⟨?_, ?_, ?_⟩, ?_, ?_, rfl⟩
    · field_simp; linarith
    · field_simp; linarith
    · linarith
    · field_simp; ring
    · field_simp; ring

  refine Set.infinite_of_injective_forall_mem (f := fun n : ℕ => ((n + 2 : ℚ) / (n + 1), (n + 1 : ℚ) / (n + 2) / (n + 2), (n + 2 : ℚ) * (n + 2) / (n + 1))) ?_ ?_

    simp only [Prod.mk.injEq] at hmn
    have h1 := hmn.1
    field_simp at h1
    linarith
  · intro n
    simp only [Set.mem_setOf_eq]
    refine ⟨_, _, _, ?_, ?_, ?_, rfl⟩
    · constructor

        intro h
        have : (n : ℚ) + 2 = (n + 1) / (n + 2) := by field_simp at h ⊢; linarith
        nlinarith [sq_nonneg (n : ℚ)]
    · field_simp
      ring
    · field_simp
